EmailTemplate.description: Container Service Email Template for Case Approval
EmailTemplate.name: CONTAINER Service Case Approval Template
EmailTemplate.subject: A case has been sent for approval
EmailTemplate.textOnly: The following case has been sent for approval- Company: {!Case.Account} Case: {!Case.CaseNumber}: {!Case.Subject} Owner: {!Case.OwnerFullName} Click on the link to access the case: {!Case.Link} Click on the link to approve the case: {!ApprovalRequest.Internal_URL}
